author: codex-duplication-audit

patch.value: Deduplicate Beads and Todos package adapter runtimes

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: jscpd found packages/pm-beads and packages/pm-todos duplicate both extension command metadata and runtime adapter logic. Index clones include beads/index.ts:34-59 vs todos/index.ts:36-61 and beads/index.ts:60-81 vs todos/index.ts:62-83. Runtime clones include beads/runtime.ts:102-118 vs todos/runtime.ts:96-112, beads/runtime.ts:121-137 vs todos/runtime.ts:116-132, beads/runtime.ts:148-165 vs todos/runtime.ts:221-238, and beads/runtime.ts:452-469 vs todos/runtime.ts:260-277. Existing pm-y5u0 covers generic runtime option readers, but this is a separate import/export adapter pattern duplication. Fix by extracting shared package adapter primitives for external-source item mapping, command contract shape, conflict/result rendering, and dry-run/import counters.

Beads and Todos packages share common adapter/runtime helpers for repeated command metadata, source mapping, import counters, and result rendering; package-specific field mapping remains explicit; beads/todos unit tests and package smoke coverage pass; pnpm build passes.

message: Create beads/todos duplication finding after duplicate-check search
